prd.title: Phase 6: Advanced UI/UX Enhancements
prd.description: Advanced UI/UX improvements including animations, accessibility enhancements, and user feedback components for dicoangelo.com

userStories.title: Page Transition Animations
userStories.description: As a user, I want smooth fade transitions when navigating between pages so that the browsing experience feels polished and professional.
acceptanceCriteria: Page content fades out when navigating away from current route
New page content fades in after route change completes
Transition duration is 200-300ms for optimal feel
No layout shift occurs during transitions

userStories.title: Scroll-Triggered Reveal Animations
userStories.description: As a user, I want content sections to animate into view as I scroll so that the page feels dynamic and engaging.
acceptanceCriteria: Sections fade in and slide up when entering viewport
Animation triggers at 20% visibility threshold
Each section animates independently with staggered timing
Animations only play once per page load

userStories.title: Hero Section Parallax Effects
userStories.description: As a user, I want the hero section to have subtle parallax depth effects so that it creates visual interest and modern appeal.
acceptanceCriteria: Background elements move at different speeds during scroll
Parallax effect is subtle (10-20% speed differential)
Effect is smooth and performant (60fps target)
Parallax disabled on touch devices for better UX

userStories.title: Toast Notification Component
userStories.description: As a user, I want to receive toast notifications for form submissions and other actions so that I have clear feedback on my interactions.
acceptanceCriteria: Toast appears in bottom-right corner with slide animation
Supports success, error, warning, and info variants
Auto-dismisses after 5 seconds with progress indicator
Includes close button for manual dismissal

userStories.title: Metric Count-Up Animations
userStories.description: As a user, I want numerical metrics to animate from zero to their final value when they come into view so that statistics feel impactful.
acceptanceCriteria: Numbers animate from 0 to target value over 2 seconds
Animation uses easing function for natural feel
Animation triggers when element is 50% visible
Supports integers, decimals, and percentage formats

userStories.title: Loading Spinner Component Variants
userStories.description: As a user, I want consistent loading indicators throughout the site so that I know when content is being fetched or processed.
acceptanceCriteria: Spinner component supports small, medium, and large sizes
Includes pulse, spin, and dots animation variants
Colors match site theme (primary, secondary, white)
Includes optional loading text with aria-live announcement

userStories.title: Keyboard Navigation Focus Trap
userStories.description: As a user who navigates with keyboard, I want focus to be trapped within modals and dialogs so that I can navigate these components without getting lost.
acceptanceCriteria: Tab key cycles through focusable elements within modal
Shift+Tab cycles backwards through focusable elements
Escape key closes the modal and returns focus to trigger
Focus moves to first focusable element when modal opens

userStories.title: Reduced Motion Mode Toggle
userStories.description: As a user with motion sensitivity, I want a toggle to disable all animations so that I can browse comfortably without triggering vestibular issues.
acceptanceCriteria: Toggle appears in site settings or footer
Respects prefers-reduced-motion system preference by default
Disables all CSS and JavaScript animations when enabled
Preference persists in localStorage across sessions
